query: SELECT item_key, amount_override, funding_source, section FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE project_id = 4 AND scenario = 'offplan_escrow' AND (item_key LIKE '%community%' OR item_key LIKE '%contractor%' OR item_key LIKE '%government%')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT item_key, amount_override, funding_source, section FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE project_id = 4 AND scenario = 'offplan_escrow' AND (item_key LIKE '%community%' OR item_key LIKE '%contractor%' OR item_key LIKE '%government%')
